steps.title: Translate and equate the two relationships
steps.content:
$a$ is 290% of $b$ gives $a = 2.9b$. $a$ is 90% of $c$ gives $a = 0.9c$.

Setting these equal:
$$2.9b = 0.9c$$

steps.title: Solve for c as a percentage of b
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.9:
$$c = \frac{2.9}{0.9}b = \frac{29}{9}b$$
Express as a percentage by multiplying by 100:
$$p = \frac{29}{9} \times 100 = \frac{2900}{9} \approx 322.22$$
The closest value is 322. That matches choice D — D is correct.
